bullets: Spooky Halloween Glitter Design - This pumpkin-shaped stress ball features clear gel with floating glitter inside. Choose from jack-o'-lantern, purple ghost, or eyeball styles – perfect for Halloween decor or party favors. halloween stress ball, glitter fidget toy, halloween party favors

Satisfying Squeeze for Anxiety Relief - Made from soft, stretchy silicone gel. Squeeze, knead, and watch the glitter swirl – a calming sensory experience that melts away daily tension. anxiety relief, stress balls for adults, sensory fidget toy

Comes with Ghost Storage Tray - Includes a matching storage tray with ghost pattern. Keeps your toy clean and protected – easy to carry in bags, backpacks, or desk drawers. desk fidget toy, portable stress relief, halloween desk decor

Safe, Non-Toxic Silicone Material - Food-grade silicone that's odorless, reusable, and gentle on hands. Durable enough for repeated squeezing without tearing or losing shape. silicone stress ball, reusable fidget toy, safe sensory toy

Great for Halloween Parties & Gifting - Ideal as party favors, classroom prizes, goodie bag fillers, or Halloween gifts. Also works as a fun desk decoration for the spooky season. halloween gifts, party favors for adults, classroom prizes
